acceptance_criteria_for_revised_submissi: Scenario status labels match formula-driven flags for all scenarios.
CSV/screenshots show the exact formulas used and corresponding computed values.
7-day loss capping is demonstrably applied in at least one capped scenario.
Memo fully documents the fixes and references the CSV/screenshots.
estimated_reviewer_actions_after_resubmi: Open CSV/screenshots to confirm label/computation consistency.
Optionally open .xlsx in an environment with openpyxl to validate cell-level formulas if needed.
expected_evidence_on_resubmission: Screenshots showing formulas and results for calculation ranges

acceptance_criteria_for_revised_submissi: Scenario status labels match formula-driven flags for all scenarios.

planned_changes: Open brine_scaling_model.xlsx and verify that pressure_adj and scale_index formulas are implemented exactly as documented: pressure_adj = base_pressure * (1 - 0.18*I3) - 8*I2; scale_index = silica*(1 - 0.45*I1)/700 + calcite + MAX(0, pressure_adj/limit - 0.9)*3.

Replace any manual status labels with a formula-driven status column computed from per-well flags: fail_flag = OR(pressure_adj > limit, scale_index > 2.3); warn_flag = AND(pressure_adj <= limit, limit - pressure_adj <= 5); scenario_status = IF(any fail_flag, 'FAIL', IF(any warn_flag, 'WARN', 'PASS')).
Recompute all scenario rows and verify numeric intermediates for each well; fix any off-by-one row references in formulas introduced during manual OpenXML generation.

Export core calculation ranges to CSV (one row per scenario) and take screenshots of the spreadsheet ranges that include both formulas and computed values for pressure_adj, scale_index, per-well flags, scenario_status, loss_raw_7d, and loss_capped_7d.
Update reinjection_decision_memo.md to cite the corrected spreadsheet ranges, include the CSV summary table (or attach it), and ensure the memo text is complete (no truncation).
Run a quick set of validation checks (unit-check cells) in the workbook: reproduce at least two hand-calculated examples (one PASS, one FAIL) in visible cells to demonstrate correctness.
Resubmit as 605-revised with attachments: CSV export, screenshots, and the untruncated memo. Add a short notes section listing the exact cells/ranges changed and why.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Correct fail/warn labeling logic and provide cell-level evidence so semantic graders and verifiers can confirm scenario statuses and loss capping.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Artifacts are present and the memo documents the model formulas and scenario table. However, semantic grading and the verifier found an internal inconsistency: several scenarios (e.g., I2, I3) are labeled PASS in package_results/memo despite the memo-quoted per-well scale_index exceeding the fail threshold (scale_index > 2.3). The spreadsheet could not be parsed in the grader environment (openpyxl unavailable), so graders relied on the memo preview and metadata. Fix the fail/warn labeling so it is derived programmatically from computed flags, and provide cell-level evidence (CSV export or screenshots) plus an untruncated memo for re-verification.
